business_question: What was the total revenue leakage by year over the last 3 years?
business_context: The CFO wants to understand whether reimbursement leakage is improving or worsening year over year.

aggregation_logic.Leakage Rate: revenue leakage divided by total claim amount

sql_answer:
SELECT
    YEAR(SUBMITTED_DATE) AS CLAIM_YEAR,
    SUM(CLAIM_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_CLAIMS,
    SUM(REVENUE_LOSS_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_LEAKAGE,
    ROUND(SUM(REVENUE_LOSS_AMOUNT)/SUM(CLAIM_AMOUNT)*100,2) AS LEAKAGE_PCT
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.HEALTHCARE.MART_REVENUE_LEAKAGE
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;
